containment.description: Did the round materially advance threat containment? 0=adversary expanded; 10=path cut decisively.

evidence.description: Were defender actions grounded in real world-state evidence? 0=guessing; 10=every action references a signal.

communication.description: Right channel, audience, urgency? 0=wrong everything; 10=perfectly targeted.

business_impact.description: Net business risk delta. 0=new risk created; 5=neutral; 10=risk reduced.

tool_trajectory_avg_score.description: ADK built-in: average match between actual and expected tool sequence.

response_match_score.description: ADK built-in: ROUGE between final agent response and reference. Loose threshold — exact match isn't expected for narrative IR comms.
